sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (original String, normalized String);
UPDATE test_table SET normalized = normalizeUTF8NFKD(original) WHERE original = 'â';
SELECT original, normalized, length(normalized) AS nfkd_length FROM test_table;
SELECT orig, normalized, length(normalized) FROM (SELECT original AS orig, normalizeUTF8NFKD(original) AS normalized FROM test_table);
